things.name: Cologne Cathedral
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Gothic masterpiece with the world's largest church facade

things.name: Museum Ludwig
things.description: Major modern art museum with the largest Picasso collection outside Spain

things.name: Chocolate Museum
things.description: Chocoholic's paradise on the Rhine with a chocolate fountain and history of cacao

things.name: Roman-Germanic Museum
things.description: Outstanding collection of Roman artefacts from ancient Colonia Agrippina

things.name: Hohenzollern Bridge
things.description: Rhine bridge famous for thousands of love locks attached to its railings

things.name: Altstadt (Old Town)
things.description: Historic centre with medieval churches, Romanesque basilicas and riverside beer gardens

things.name: Cologne Zoo
things.description: One of Germany's oldest zoos with hippos, gorillas and the historic elephant house

things.name: Claudius Therme
things.description: Roman-style thermal spa on the banks of the Rhine

things.name: Mediapark
things.description: Creative district with a lake, media companies and Cologne's broadcasting studios

things.name: Koelsch Brewery Tour
things.description: Tasting tour of Cologne's unique top-fermented Koelsch beer, only brewed in the city
